definition: The extinction, suspension or temporary discontinuance of a civil action due to some event.
When the offeree gives assent to the proposal made by the proposer.
Every promise and every set of promises forming consideration for each other.
A person employed to act on behalf of another person.
Modification of the Articles of Association of a company.
A mandatory yearly meeting of shareholders.
The document containing the internal regulations of a company.
A committee constituted by the Board to oversee financial reporting.
